subcodes.first_line: This is the Book of Glory unto him who hath been grieved by the tribulations that have befallen him in this world, that the joy of the Call may take possession of him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب البهاء الی الذی حزن بما ورد علیه من مصائب الدنیا لیاخذه فرح ندآء
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
